seoTitle: Hazeldean vs Headington Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hazeldean and Headington Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hazeldean vs Headington Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hazeldean and Headington Hill.
heading: Hazeldean vs Headington Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hazeldean, Queensland and Headington Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Headington Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Hazeldean (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hazeldean or Headington Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hazeldean has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Headington Hill scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hazeldean scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Headington Hill scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hazeldean or Headington Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Headington Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
